local_validation_note: Public candidate inherits the workspace release validation through the final Go/No-Go evidence bundled in the candidate.

milestones.title: Public GitHub Repository
milestones.approval_phrase: Approve public GitHub publication for the clean agentops-control-tower candidate.
milestones.blocker: Needs explicit public GitHub publication approval.
milestones.notes: This is the first required external artifact. Publish only from the clean staged candidate after approval.

milestones.title: Public Demo Video
milestones.approval_phrase: Approve recording and public upload of the Agentic Incident Command Center demo video.
milestones.blocker: Needs explicit recording and public upload approval.
milestones.notes: Record and upload only after screen-safety review. Keep the video under 3 minutes.

milestones.title: Optional Live Splunk / MCP Proof
milestones.approval_phrase: Approve optional live Splunk and Splunk MCP proof using synthetic data only.
milestones.blocker: Optional. Needs explicit approval, account scope, credentials, and synthetic-data-only guardrails.
milestones.notes: Skip if it risks cost, credential exposure, or deadline slip. The local submission remains viable without live proof.

milestones.title: Approved URL Writeback
milestones.approval_phrase: Approve writing the verified public repository and demo video URLs into local submission artifacts.
milestones.blocker: Blocked until both public repository and public demo video URLs are verified.
milestones.notes: Write approved URLs only after both public artifacts are public and read back.

milestones.title: Devpost Final Submission
milestones.approval_phrase: Approve final Devpost submission for Agentic Incident Command Center.
milestones.blocker: Blocked until public URLs, human confirmations, final checklist, validation, and explicit final approval are complete.
milestones.notes: Submit before the target time, then read back the submitted Devpost page/status into local evidence.

minimum_viable_path: Approve and publish the clean public GitHub repository.
Approve recording and public upload of the under-3-minute demo video.
Verify both public URLs, then approve local URL writeback.
Complete human confirmations and Devpost final review checklist.
Rerun validation and submit on Devpost only after explicit final approval.
stretch_path: Approve optional live Splunk/MCP proof only if account scope, credential handling, and time are safe.
Use synthetic data only and upgrade claim wording only after proof cites event IDs and evidence references.
boundary: This burndown is local planning evidence only. It does not publish a repository, record or upload video, connect to Splunk, configure MCP, write approved URLs, update Devpost, save a draft, press submit, or submit anything.
